function.name: code_run
function.description: Code executor. Prefer python. Multi-call OK, use script param. Reply code block is executed if no script arg; prefer for single call to avoid escaping. No hardcoding bulk data

script.description: [Mutually exclusive] NEVER use this param when use reply code block.

inline_eval.description: DO NOT USE except explicitly specified.

function.name: file_read
function.description: Read file. Read before modify for latest context and line numbers

function.name: file_patch
function.description: Replace unique old_content with new_content. Exact match required (whitespace/indentation). On failure, file_read to recheck

old_content.description: Original text block to replace (must be unique)

new_content.description: New content. Supports {{file:path:startLine:endLine}} to ref file lines, auto-expanded

function.name: file_write
function.description: Create/overwrite/append files. HUGE edits ONLY. Supports {{file:path:startLine:endLine}}, auto-expanded

function.name: web_scan
function.description: Get simplified HTML and tab list. Removes hidden/floating/covered elements. Call after switching pages

tabs_only.description: Show tab list only, no HTML

function.name: web_execute_js
function.description: Execute JS. Multi-call OK with different switch_tab_id. No guessing. Act accurately to reduce web_scan calls. Execute JS in ```javascript blocks if no script arg, prefer to avoid escaping

script.description: [Mutually exclusive] JS code or script path. NEVER use this param when use reply code block

no_monitor.description: Skip page change monitoring, saves 2-3s. Only for reads, not for page actions

switch_tab_id.description: [Optional] Tab ID to switch to before executing

function.name: update_working_checkpoint
function.description:
Short-term working notepad, auto-injected each turn to prevent info loss in long tasks. Call during early/mid stages, not at end. When: (1) after reading SOP, store user needs & key constraints (skip for simple 1-2 step tasks); (2) before subtask switch or context flush; (3) after repeated failures, re-read SOP and must store new findings; (4) on new task, update content, clear old progress but keep valid constraints.

Don't call: simple tasks (1-2 steps), task completed (use long-term memory tool)

key_info.description: Replaces current notepad (<200 tokens). Incremental update: review existing, keep valid, add/remove/modify. Store: pitfalls, user requirements, key params/findings, file paths, progress, next steps. Don't store: ephemeral info, obvious context, old task info when user switched tasks. Prefer over-updating over losing key info

related_sop.description: Related SOP names, tips for further re-read

function.name: ask_user
function.description: Interrupt task to ask user when needing decisions, extra info, or facing unresolvable blockers. Multiple questions should in one call

question.description: For multiple questions, one per line (contain candidates)

candidates.description: Optional quick-select choices for a single question only. Leave empty for multi-questions

function.name: start_long_term_update
function.description: Start distilling long-term memory. Call when discovering info worth remembering (env facts/user prefs/lessons learned). Skip if memory already updated or in autonomous flow. Must call when a task that took 15+ turns is completed

function.name: handoff
function.description: P1b Handoff: 把当前对话任务交给另一个更擅长的模型继续。按领域选：编码→claude/deepseek，中文/快速→kimi/glm，深度推理→deepseek。包含上下文历史迁移，接手模型直接继续。

target.description: 目标模型名/编号/关键词。如: 'deepseek' / '1' / 'claude'。留空则自动切到下一个。

reason.description: 交接原因，如: '编码任务更擅长' / '需要深度推理' / '中文对话更自然'

function.name: planner
function.description: P2⑤ Multi-agent Planner entry: decompose task into subtasks & assign to best-fit models. Provides capability list; then use handoff to execute each subtask on the assigned model.

task.description: The complex task to decompose into subtasks for multi-model execution

function.name: moa
function.description: Mixture-of-Agents (P3): Run multiple models in parallel as proposers, score each with quality estimator, then aggregate (or pick best). Use for complex reasoning/creative/code where multi-model synthesis improves quality.

query.description: The query to run through multiple models

use_aggregator.description: If true (default), use primary model to synthesize proposals; if false, pick highest-scored proposal
